assumptions: The developer has a supported browser and a terminal with cURL.
No prior account, API key, or successful API request exists yet.

developer_goal: Create a Mistral account, enable Studio Free mode, generate an API key, and complete a chat-completions request over HTTPS without installing an SDK.

first_success.outcome: POST https://api.mistral.ai/v1/chat/completions with a Bearer key returns chat-completion output on Studio Free mode without a credit card.
first_success.observable_signal: The HTTP response body includes assistant message content for the requested prompt.

route_selection.surface: Mistral Developer API via cURL chat completions (Studio Free mode)
route_selection.rule: Prefer the shortest complete path that reaches an authenticated API response without requiring an SDK when cURL is documented.
route_selection.selected: Mistral Developer API via cURL chat completions (Studio Free mode)

candidates.name: Mistral Developer API via cURL chat completions (Studio Free mode)
candidates.reason: Mistral's Activate Studio guide states Studio is enabled in Free mode by default with no credit card required, and an API key can be generated for model calls. The API reference documents cURL to https://api.mistral.ai/v1/chat/completions.

candidates.name: SDK-first quickstart tab
candidates.reason: SDK install is optional when official docs document an equivalent cURL call.

required_path.action: Open the Developer first-API-request quickstart and follow its API-key prerequisite link.
required_path.observable_result: Activate Studio and generate an API key is reachable.

required_path.action: Create or sign in to a Mistral account and open Studio.
required_path.observable_result: API key creation controls are reachable.

required_path.action: Create a new API key, copy the secret immediately, and store it securely.
required_path.observable_result: The key value is saved locally.
MISTRAL_API_KEY is set in the current shell.

required_path.action: POST a chat-completions request with cURL to https://api.mistral.ai/v1/chat/completions.
required_path.observable_result: The API returns a successful JSON body containing assistant message content.

required_path.action: Confirm the chat-completions JSON includes assistant message content.
required_path.observable_result: Assistant content is present in the successful response.

prerequisites.description: A Mistral AI account that can open Studio.
A Mistral API key created in Studio, copied immediately, and exported as MISTRAL_API_KEY.
A terminal with cURL (or any HTTP client). No language SDK is required for the HTTPS first call.

external_gates.description: API access requires a Mistral account with Studio enabled.
Studio Free mode is enabled by default with no credit card required; usage and rate limits apply.
The API key secret is shown once and must be stored safely.

platform_outcomes.description: POST https://api.mistral.ai/v1/chat/completions with a Bearer key returns chat-completion output on Studio Free mode without a credit card.

excluded.reason: Official docs document an equivalent cURL call.

sources.title: Activate Studio and generate an API key
Test a model in the API playground

uncertainties.question: Exact Free-mode rate-limit and quota values for a brand-new account on the day of research.
uncertainties.impact: Could cause the first cURL call to fail with a rate-limit error before any billing upgrade.
uncertainties.evidence_needed: Free-mode pages state that usage and rate limits apply without enumerating the numeric Free-mode matrix on the researched pages.
